## Analyzers (1)

### StamusNetworks_HostID `v1.0`
Get information from your Scirius Security Platform for an IP address.

- **Author:** Stamus Networks
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `ip`
- **Configuration:** [View config](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/StamusNetworks/StamusNetworks_IPInfo.json)
